title: Fedje

{{Quote|We lost contact with him during the retreat. I'm still hoping he was able to punch through the other side of the pincer and hook up with one of the units at Fedje or Ketaris.|Pash Cracken, on Varth's fate|<ref name="TLC" />}}
'''Fedje''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim's]] [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]]. It was home to many exotic creatures, including the rare [[folded ear boosqueak]]. The planet was visited by members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] operatives later posed as natives of the planet while carrying out sabotage on the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]].

==Description==
Located in the [[Atrivis sector/Legends|Atrivis sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], Fedje was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a number of large continents covered in forests. These contained many exotic arboreal lifeforms, including the rare [[folded ear boosqueak]]. It also had at least one large [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]].<ref name="SWR" /> The inhabitants of the planet included [[Human/Legends|Humans]], who settled in the [[Betreasley district]]. They became known for their expansive hand gestures while speaking.<ref name="VF" />

Fedje was located at the intersection of the [[Braxant Run/Legends|Braxant]] and [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Runs]]. The Braxant was the most important [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] through [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] northern quadrant, while the Relgim Run traversed the Atrivis sector.<ref name="TEA" />

==History==
During the [[Pius Dea Era]], refugees from Fedje fled the theocratic and tyrannical [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] to [[Prefid's Belt]], a [[Constellation/Legends|constellation]] visible in Fedje's skies. There they settled [[Prefsbelt IV/Legends|Prefsbelt IV]], which became a refuge for [[Pius Dea]] [[Renunciates]].<ref name="TEGtW">''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]''</ref>

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], members of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], including [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], visited the planet. During the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] resurgence under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], the neighboring world of [[Generis/Legends|Generis]] was [[Fall of Generis|captured]] by the Empire. Among those that escaped the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] defeat was [[Wing Commander/Legends|Wing Commander]] [[Varth]]. Fellow survivor [[Pash Cracken]] lost contact with Varth during the retreat but held out hope that he may have regrouped with forces on Fedje or, alternatively, [[Ketaris/Legends|Ketaris]].<ref name="TLC" />

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent [[Drend Navett]] impersonated a native of Fedje in order to infiltrate the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]] during the [[Caamas Document Crisis]]. Making use of the expansive hand gestures typical of Betreasley inhabitants to make his performance more convincing, he posed as an exotic pet salesman as a cover for sabotage activities. He was trying to incite violence against the Bothans after it had been discovered that an unidentified group of them had been involved in the [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] [[Caamas Firestorm|bombardment]] of [[Caamas/Legends|Caamas]] decades earlier. Navett later [[Death/Legends|died]] while sabotaging a [[Power generator/Legends|power generator]].<ref name="VF" />

In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], the galaxy was invaded by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], an extra-galactic [[Species/Legends|species]] determined to conquer the galaxy. Advancing on the galaxy from their entry point [[Vector Prime]], they [[Battle of the Fedje system|assaulted]] Fedje in the early years of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Fedje was first mentioned in [[Timothy Zahn]]'s novel ''[[The Last Command]]''. He referenced the planet again in his later work, ''[[Vision of the Future]]''. The planet first appeared in the computer game [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]. It depicted the planet with a generic image that was used for 21 other planets.

===''Star Wars: Rebellion'' cartography===
''Star Wars: Rebellion'' provided travel times between planets within the same sector; however, on a number of occasions, these were significantly longer than other canonical sources. As such, these travel times seem to reflect game mechanics rather than canonical travel times. Nonetheless, the times given for Fedje were as follows:

!width="60"|Despayre
!width="60"|Generis
!width="60"|Moltok
!width="60"|Spefik
!width="60"|Zeffliffl
!width="100"|To Coruscant
|-
| '''Fedje''' || 12 days || 8 days || 7 days || 8 days || 3 days || 7 days || 29 days
|}
